evidence: standards/enterprise/privacy-compliance.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: No ownerless processing is permitted; an incomplete inventory entry requires Privacy Owner approval, exact missing fields, interim control, owner, expiry, and completion plan.
statement: Every collected, derived, stored, or disclosed data category has an owned inventory entry identifying declared purpose, DATA-CLASS-001 class, source, processing and storage, recipients, retention, deletion, user control, and accountable owners.
